name: GIGABYTE B760M D3H Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - D-Sub - 2x DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.0 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Gigabit LAN

description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with B760 chipset and dual network connectivity.
